title: Vaxinated 2 A Musical Booster
description: Step into a world where glamour meets showtunes! Rubella Vaxine takes centre stage in a high-camp, high-octane drag extravaganza featuring iconic numbers from the great musicals. From belt-your-heart-out ballads to razzle-dazzle showstoppers, she spins Broadway classics into something delightfully queer, wickedly funny, and unmistakably Rubella. Expect bold looks, big vocals, and even bigger personality as she brings your favourite musical moments to life with a twist. Whether you’re a theatre kid at heart or just here for the glitter, this show promises laughs, gasps, and a standing ovation you’ll feel in your soul. Accompanied by the phenomenal talent of Izzy Owen on keys and maybe some surprise guests will also be popping in too. You will not want to miss this one-night only event at the Brighton Fringe! Lights up. Wig secured. Let the overture begin.
